profile.name: David William
profile.headline: I build polished web, mobile, and automation products with practical AI integrations, cloud-ready backends, and clean user experiences.
profile.about: Full stack developer focused on production-ready platforms across Next.js, React Native, Spring Boot, TypeScript, and automation. I use AI as a coding assistant and integration tool where it adds value, while keeping the architecture, implementation, and quality decisions grounded in solid engineering.

projects.title: AI Basedd Internship recommender
projects.summary: AI-powered skill matching platform for students and recruiters.
highlights: Built an AI-powered skill matching platform for students and recruiters.
Developed backend APIs for resume processing, recommendations, authentication, and analytics.
Integrated machine learning models to score skills against job requirements and taxonomy data.
Created responsive frontend dashboards for managing profiles, resumes, quizzes, and recommendations.
Automated training data processing and model fine-tuning for improved matching accuracy.

projects.title: Realmbot
projects.summary: Microservice-based Discord and web automation platform for realm workflows.
highlights: Architected microservices for bot, API, verification, and web modules.
Built TypeScript backend with handlers, routes, services, and utilities.
Implemented Discord bot workflows for realm automation.
Integrated Xbox Live OAuth and NextAuth authentication pipelines.
Developed Next.js App Router frontend with server-side rendering.
Engineered modular UI components with Tailwind and Framer Motion.
Added token validation, rate limiting, and secure session handling.
Containerized services using Docker for consistent deployment.
Structured shared packages for linting, logging, and configuration.
Optimized real-time verification flows with robust error states.

projects.title: Realmcenter
projects.summary: Next.js marketplace for Minecraft Bedrock Realm listings.
highlights: Built a Next.js marketplace for Minecraft Bedrock Realm listings.
Implemented authentication, email verification, and password reset flows.
Added Xbox linking for realm ownership verification.
Developed vote workflows with ad-gated progression and limits.
Created admin moderation tools for listings and approvals.
Designed reusable public, profile, and legal page components.

projects.title: College Event Management app
projects.summary: Cross-platform college event management system with approvals and analytics.
highlights: Built a cross-platform college event management system for event creation, registration, and approvals.
Developed the frontend in Expo React Native for Android, iOS, and web deployment.
Implemented role-based navigation and dashboards for admin, management, faculty, and student users.
Added secure JWT authentication with session persistence using secure token storage.
Created Spring Boot REST and GraphQL APIs for users, colleges, organisations, events, and analytics.
Designed relational modules for colleges, departments, memberships, events, and registrations.
Built multi-level approval workflows for event and user verification across institutional roles.
Enabled full event lifecycle management: create, update, delete, approve, reject, and register.
Developed admin tools for college setup, department management, and management-user onboarding.
Used Apollo Client, NativeWind, and React Native Paper for responsive UI and efficient data handling.
